entities.name: Warrior COMT (GG)
entities.context: Genetic variant affecting dopamine clearance; V has this genotype which impacts recovery needs

entities.name: Day 6 Restorative/Active Recovery
entities.context: Non-optional recovery day in V's training program, critical due to fast dopamine clearance

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable used to monitor resting heart rate as a recovery signal

entities.name: Elevated Resting HR
entities.context: Biomarker signal indicating need to back off from intense training

relationships.context: Fast dopamine clearance from GG genotype makes dedicated recovery days non-optional
Stacking hard training days with this genotype can elevate resting HR, signaling overtraining
Fitbit tracks resting HR as the primary signal to detect when V should back off intensity
